description: SLS(20) as compiled by this session (0 errors/0 warnings), with ONE deliberate revert vs the original SLS(20): Phase 3B.5 (OptimizeSessionWeightsPerRegime) guard restored to its known-safe no-op state. Root cause: that phase is a newly-activated (by SLS20 fix 3) 3x7^6-combo grid search x up to 36 contexts with zero time-budget guard -- caused 2 confirmed Application Hang force-closes of MT4. This revert is proven: got cleanly through P1-P3B (all 9 regimes) past the old hang point. NOT merged with SLS(21)'s 20 correctness fixes -- that's a separate, concurrent deliverable from another session that does not include this fix.
